series_metadata.series_description: Statement of benefits paid to combined wage claimants which is sent to participating states on a quarterly basis. Each statement contains a list of claimants whose out of state wages have been used to establish Ohio eligibility. Each statement indicates the amounts of benefits Ohio is charging the participating state per quarter for its participation of Ohio combined wage claims, and itemizes the amount Ohio charges for each claimant listed on the statement. A “ledger record” is created in FoxPro for tracking purposes and to balance receipts against disbursements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office for 4 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in the office for 4 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
